purpose: Product or subject with editorial magazine-style typography overlay.

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Premium magazine cover layout featuring {product_or_subject_descriptor} with editorial typography overlay reading '{headline_text}' in elegant serif typeface and '{tagline_text}' in smaller sans-serif beneath, product occupies right two-thirds of frame, typography in left third, neutral premium background, soft directional light, magazine-cover composition, no text errors {cultural_constraints_injection}
notes: Intents: launch. Source code in research corpus: T38. Saudi adaptation guidance: GPT Image 2 used because Arabic typography needs compositional integration. Bilingual headline. Cairo font for Arabic. Reference image: Required. Recommended frequency: 1 per month.
